expectations.evidence: Would run after each task commit — 'catching failures close to source is cheaper'.
'Two missing @throws tags are a 30-second fix. Proceeding to task-2 with known failures compounds the problem.'

expectations.text: Fixes issues before moving to next task
expectations.evidence: Explicitly: 'Missing @throws tags are mechanical — add, re-run, confirm green, then move to task-2.'
'Momentum is false economy. The quality-recheck stage after review will catch failures anyway.'

notes: Without-skill agent runs checks per-task (better aligned with eval expectations than the skill's post-all-tasks approach). Skill gap confirmed.
